title: S.O. 2645(E), dated 28th September, 2015 has notified that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles

jktekxZ vf/kfu;e] 1956 ¼1956 dk 48½ dh /kkjk 8d }kjk iznRr 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq,] ,rn~}kjk dk-vk- vf/klwpuk dk-vk- 2738 ¼v½] rkjh[k 21-10-2014 }kjk izdkf’kr vf/klwpuk esa fuEufyf[kr la’kks/ku djrh gS% fVIif.k;ksa ds iSjk 1 vkSj 2 ds v/khu lkj.kh esa Vksy Iyktk ds voLFkku ¼pSust½ dks fuEu izdkj ls i<+k tk,xk% fo|eku ds LFkku ij fuEufyf[kr izdkj izfrLFkkfir fd;k tk,xk m|e flag uxj ftys esa xkao nsofj;k ds ikl jkjk&74 ij 222- 500 fd-eh- ij ¼fo|eku 22-350 fd-eh-½ m|e flag uxj ftys esa xkao nsofj;k ds ikl jkjk&74 ij 222- 270 fd-eh- ij ¼fo|eku 222-120 fd-eh-½ [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13&14@lhvks@thlh ¼dk’khiqj&flrkjxat½] yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd June, 2016 S.O. 2181(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and amended vide G.S.R 950(E) dated 3rd December, 2010 & G.S.R 15(E) dated 12th January, 2011, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 2738(E) dated 21.10.2014, authorized M/s. Kashipur-Sitarganj Highways Pvt. Ltd. to collect and retain the fee for the development of Kashipur-Sitarganj section from km 175.000 to km 252.200 (existing ch. 256.900) on National Highway No. 74 (hereinafter referred to as the “said section”) to four lane standards and operation and maintenance of the said section on Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) basis under NHDP-IV; Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and amended vide G.S.R 950(E) dated 3rd December, 2010 & G.S.R 15(E) dated 12th January, 2011, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide S.O. 2738(E) dated 21.10.2014:- The location of Toll Plaza (chainage) in the Table under para 1 & 2 of notes shall be read as follows: In place of existing Shall be substituted as At km. 222.500 (existing km 222.350) on NH-74 near village Deoria in district Udham Singh Nagar At km. 222.270 (existing km. 222.120) on NH-74 near Village Deoria in district Udham Singh Nagar [F. No. NHAI/ 13-14/ CO/ GC (Kashipur-Sitarganj)] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by the Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
